blur_detection.description: The text is sharp and clearly defined with no signs of blur.

contrast_assessment.description: Excellent contrast between text and background, ensuring clear text recognition.

glare_identification.description: No glare or bright spots are present that obscure the text.

water_stains.description: No water stains or discolorations are present on the document.

tears_or_folds.description: No tears, creases, or folds are visible on the document.

cut_off_detection.description: No edges of the document are cut off, and the entire document is captured.

missing_sections.description: All sections of the receipt/invoice are present and complete.

obstructions.description: No obstructions such as objects, fingers, or shadows are blocking the document content.

classification.reasoning: The document contains multiple fields that align with the expense schema, including supplier, consumerRecipient, transactionAmount, transactionDate, invoiceReceiptNumber, taxInformation, and itemDescriptionLineItems. The document is a detailed receipt from Starbucks, indicating a completed transaction for food items.

schema_field_analysis.expense_identification_reasoning: The document contains 7 out of 8 required fields, confirming it as an expense document. The fields present include supplier, consumerRecipient, transactionAmount, transactionDate, invoiceReceiptNumber, taxInformation, and itemDescriptionLineItems.

issues.description: Missing mandatory customer name on the receipt
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Under the Local Partner Procloz, the receipt and supporting documents should be in the name of the worker

issues.description: Missing mandatory customer address on the receipt
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Ensure the submitted documents are BIR registered and reflect the vendor's TIN, business name, and address

issues.description: Missing mandatory customer TIN on the receipt
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Ensure the submitted documents are BIR registered and reflect the vendor's TIN, business name, and address

issues.description: Meal expenses are not tax exempt and will be grossed up
issues.recommendation: Domestic and international business travel expenses follow the same process as reimbursement of non travel expenses. There are no set government per diem rates and employers can reimburse against receipts and invoices. The corporate income tax rate is currently at 30% for domestic corporations and resident foreign corporations
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Domestic and international business travel expenses follow the same process as reimbursement of non travel expenses. There are no set government per diem rates and employers can reimburse against receipts and invoices. The corporate income tax rate is currently at 30% for domestic corporations and resident foreign corporations

validation_result.compliance_summary: The receipt contains several compliance violations including missing mandatory fields such as customer name, customer address, and customer TIN. Additionally, the meal expenses will be grossed up as they are not tax exempt.
